name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Financial assistance and interest subsidy to help low and middle income families build or buy a home.
benefits: Direct construction assistance for eligible families

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Direct income support of Rs. 6,000 per year for landholding farmer families.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans up to Rs. 10 lakh for micro and small business owners.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: High-interest savings scheme for the future education and marriage expenses of a girl child.

name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: Free health cover of up to Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
benefits: Cashless hospitalization up to Rs. 5 lakh/year

name: Skill India Mission (PMKVY)
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Free short-term skill training with certification for youth to improve employability.

name: Startup India
description: Tax exemptions, funding support, and simplified compliance for recognized startups.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs. 1,000-5,000 after age 60 for unorganized sector workers.
